RESULT_DETAILS: Result 1 of 1: 204Pb-corr. 207Pb/206Pb data; Weighted mean. ROCK EVENT = Metamorphism: 2427 +/- 4 Ma (95% confidence). MSWD = 0.47, probability = 0.76.

GROUP_DESCRIPTION: Model 2 discordia: upper intercept approximationg magmatic crystallisation age; lower intercept isotopic resetting.
RESULT_DETAILS: Result 1 of 1: 204Pb-corr. 238U/206Pb and 207Pb/206Pb data; Discordia regression. Upper intercept: ROCK EVENT = Magmatic crystallisation: 2823 +/- 37 Ma (95% confidence). Lower intercept: Isotopic resetting: 2161 +/- 250 Ma (95% confidence). MSWD = 1.8.
PUBLICATION: Fraser, G.L., Neumann, N.L., 2010. New SHRIMP U-Pb zircon ages from the Gawler Craton and Curnamona Province, South Australia, 2008-2010. Geoscience Australia. Record 2010/16, p256
